nodes.label: Value
nodes.description: Input value (0..1) fed to distribution function

nodes.label: Gamma
nodes.description: Shape modifier for the distribution curve

nodes.label: NumClones
nodes.description: Number of active clones to address

nodes.label: MIDI In
nodes.description: Note-on frequency replaces Value for MIDI-reactive modes

nodes.label: Mode
nodes.description: Selects distribution algorithm (spread, scale, triangle, harmonics, nyquist, fixed, ducker, random, toggle)

nodes.label: Distribute
nodes.description: Calls LogicType::getValue(index, numClones, value, gamma) for each clone

nodes.label: Per-Clone Output
nodes.description: Sends computed value to each clone's target parameter (normalised)
